documentation.description:
Experimental/recreative implementations of the Burrows-Wheeler
Transform (BWT), a block-sorting pre-processing for improving
data compression (this step is called pre-compression).

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Burrows%E2%80%93Wheeler_transform

enumeration_literals.name: matrix_sorting
enumeration_literals.description: Build a matrix with rotated strings and sort them (super-slow and memory-hungry!).

enumeration_literals.name: index_sorting
enumeration_literals.description: Sort the indices of the rotated strings (the matrix is not built in real).

subprograms.name: Decode
subprograms.code: procedure Decode (message : in out String; index : in Positive)

subprograms.name: Encode
subprograms.code: procedure Encode (message : in out String; index : out Positive; method : Encoding_Method)
